chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-174 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.02.2019 Mr. Asif Ali Talpur, Advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Sajjad Ahmed Chandio advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. alongwith SIP Laloo Mal, P.S City, Umerkot and SIP Qurban Rajar, P.S Islamkot. -.-.-. Mr. Zaheer Uddin Nohri, Advocate, has filed power on behalf of respondent No.8, whereas, learned Additional Advocate General Sindh has filed comments of respondent No.5, which are taken on record. Alleged detainee namely Mst. Shazia has appeared and has stated that she has converted to Islam and has contracted marriage with respondent No.8 Soomar out of her own freewill and choice without being forced or coerced by him. She further submits that she has not been abducted by anyone and this petition has been filed on false facts and that she is happily living with her husband and wants to go with him. On the court direction she has had a meeting with her parents, who are available in the court and even thereafter she has reiterated the same facts. This being the position, we do not see any merit in this petition. Learned Counsel who is holding brief on behalf of learned counsel for the petitioner is also satisfied. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of in the terms as stated above. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
